templates.name: Antonio Paving
templates.subject: Paving and bricklaying subcontractor - Notting Hill, Melbourne
templates.body:
Hi [COMPANY],

I'm Antonio, owner of Antonio PrimeScape Construction in Melbourne's south-east. We've been operating since 2014 with $20M public liability insurance.

We handle paving, bricklaying, decking and landscaping for builders and construction companies across Melbourne. Every job is owner-operated with a written fixed-price quote after a site visit.

If you have an upcoming project - new build, extension or commercial job - I'd welcome the chance to quote.

Regards,
Antonio
0406 170 544

templates.name: Prime Property Maintenance
templates.audience: Real Estate Agents, Property Managers & Strata
templates.subject: Property maintenance services - Melbourne SE suburbs
templates.body:
Hi [COMPANY],

I'm writing from Prime Property Maintenance, based in Notting Hill and covering Melbourne's south-eastern suburbs. We work with real estate agents, property managers and strata committees.

We handle decking, fencing, gardening, pressure washing, gutter cleaning, general handyman repairs, end-of-lease preparation and small removals. We provide fixed pricing and a quote within two hours.

We're fully insured with $20M public liability and we're currently taking on new property portfolios.

Regards,
Antonio
0468 166 249
